creator: matthew.seaman@thebunker.net
text:
I have a new HP DL140G3 server runing RELENG_7_0 which has been stable
up to now.  However the combination of configuring it as an IPSec tunnel
end-point and then turning on some Nagios monitoring via the tunnel
causes the machine to crash within a few minutes.  kgdb backtrace attached
from the latest crash attached.

I'm using racoon from security/ipsec-tools for IKE -- I had tried
previously using security/isakmpd but in that case I found the process
would run fine for maybe 20 minutes, then get into a loop where it chewed
up lots of RAM very fast, until the kernel killed it.
